description.initial: White cottages, flowering gardens, a central fountain. People move through the village with calm, identical smiles. They notice you and turn, one after another, their expressions not changing. 'Welcome,' one says. 'Stay forever.' Their eyes are peaceful. Completely peaceful. The smiles never reach them.
description.return: The island village. The Smiling Ones continue their eternal, empty contentment.
description.atmospheric: The sun never moves. The breeze never changes. The smiles never fade. Nothing ever changes.

north.blockedMessage: The village is landlocked. There is no way north from here.

npcs.dialogue: Welcome! Stay! Everything is perfect here. Always perfect. You will be happy here. We are always happy. Have you tried the fruit? The fruit is perfect. Stay forever. Everyone stays forever. It is perfect here.

dialogueConditions.text: Your friend found the quiet beach. He is happy there. We are all happy. You should be happy too. Stay. Stay. Stay.

items.itemMessage: You crack open the coconut and enjoy the sweet water and flesh inside.
You peel and eat the ripe bananas. Delicious and filling!

interactables.name: Fountain
interactables.examineText: A fountain of clear water that never splashes, never makes a sound. The water rises and falls in perfect, silent arcs. It's beautiful and deeply wrong.
interactables.interactionText: You touch the water. It's neither warm nor cold. It has no temperature at all. Like everything here, it simply is, without life, without change.

interactables.name: Flowers
interactables.examineText: The flowers are in perfect bloom, but they have no scent. When you touch them, they feel real, but they don't move. They're frozen in eternal beauty.
